ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "pregnant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is pregnant */,
  "thyroid_surgery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has undergone thyroid surgery */,
  "I131_treatment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has received I131 treatment */,
  "goitre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has goitre */,
  "tumor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a tumor */,
  "hypopituitary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has hypopituitarism */,
  "psych" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has psychological issues */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address for contact and location-based analysis */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number for communication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email for communication and appointment reminders */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth for more accurate age calculations */,
  "medical_insurance" TEXT /* Patient's medical insurance provider and policy number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Patient's smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker, former smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Patient's alcohol consumption status (e.g., non-drinker, light drinker, heavy drinker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient taking the medication */,
  "on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on thyroxine */,
  "query_on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has queried about thyroxine */,
  "on_antithyroid_medication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on antithyroid medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., once daily, twice daily) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions related to the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the test */,
  "TSH_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if TSH was measured */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH test result */,
  "T3_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if T3 was measured */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 test result */,
  "TT4_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if TT4 was measured */,
  "TT4" REAL /* TT4 test result */,
  "T4U_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if T4U was measured */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U test result */,
  "FTI_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if FTI was measured */,
  "FTI" REAL /* FTI test result */,
  "TBG_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if TBG was measured */,
  "TBG" REAL /* TBG test result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "lab_technician" TEXT /* Name of the lab technician who conducted the test */,
  "test_results_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the test results */,
  "referring_physician" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_tests_referring_physician FOREIGN KEY ("referring_physician") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "query_hypothyroid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has queried about hypothyroidism */,
  "query_hyperthyroid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has queried about hyperthyroidism */,
  "lithium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on lithium */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral for the patient */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Classification of the patient's thyroid condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the diagnosis (e.g., 1-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_diagnosed_by FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., endocrinologist, general practitioner, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or specialty of the user */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was employed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record is being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app, API) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access (e.g., patient follow-up, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_access_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "plan_review_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment plan was last reviewed */,
  "plan_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
